quicksight.dataset.newdefaultvalues.CfnA: The new default values for the parameter.

quicksight.dataset.newdefaultvalues.Date.Description: A list of static default values for a given date time parameter. The valid format for this property is `yyyy-MM-dd’T’HH:mm:ss’Z’`.

quicksight.dataset.newdefaultvalues.Deci.Description: A list of static default values for a given decimal parameter.

quicksight.dataset.newdefaultvalues.Inte.Description: A list of static default values for a given integer parameter.

quicksight.dataset.newdefaultvalues.Stri.Description: A list of static default values for a given string parameter.
